description_long: This doll is modeled after a science fiction hunter, featuring a muscular humanoid form clad in intricate armor and gear. The body is covered in a mesh-patterned suit, with dark metallic armor plates on the shoulders, forearms, shins, and chest, as well as a helmet with a smooth, opaque visor. The doll's hands are equipped with large, bladed gauntlets, and various pouches, straps, and skull-like ornaments are attached to the belt and torso. The back displays a large, mechanical backpack and long, dreadlock-like appendages extending from the head. The overall appearance is rugged, tactical, and highly detailed, evoking a sense of advanced alien technology and combat readiness.
description: A highly detailed, armored humanoid doll with a helmet, bladed gauntlets, and tactical gear, inspired by a science fiction hunter. Features include a mesh bodysuit, metallic armor, and mechanical accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the helmeted face, mesh bodysuit, chest armor, bladed gauntlets, and detailed belt with pouches and skull ornament.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the helmet, shoulder armor, arm gauntlet, and the mechanical backpack protruding from the back.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full mechanical backpack, long dreadlock-like hair, back armor, and additional pouches and gear on the belt.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the side profile of the helmet, arm armor, and the arrangement of accessories and armor on the right leg and arm.
attribute_clothing_style: Futuristic armored bodysuit with mesh pattern, dark metallic shoulder and limb plates, tactical belt with pouches and skull ornament, and a full-face helmet with a smooth visor. The style is inspired by science fiction and combat gear, reminiscent of the Predator franchise.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with legs slightly apart, arms extended outward at an angle from the body, head facing forward, and torso erect. The pose is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The face is fully covered by a helmet with an opaque visor, so no facial expression is visible.
attribute_hair_style: Long, thick, black dreadlock-like appendages extending from the back of the helmet, arranged in a loose, flowing manner.
